description.ko: 백색광이 투명한 유리를 통과하며 찬란한 색의 배열로 분산되는 물리적 현상을 시각적으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of light physics, capturing the precise moment white light splits into a brilliant array of colors through crystalline glass.

prompt: Macro shot of a geometric glass prism refracting a single beam of intense white light into a vivid, sharp rainbow spectrum. Chromatic aberration, caustic light patterns on a dark minimalist background, ethereal glow, hyper-realistic textures, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, sharp focus on the internal light dispersion.
